Operation 'getCoinOHLCVLatest' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Original summary 'Get OHLC for the last full day' is vague about what 'last full day' means. Description lacks context about data freshness and use case. Enhanced version clarifies that this returns the most recent completed day's data, explains the update frequency, and helps AI agents understand when to use this versus the historical endpoint.

data.current_summary: Get OHLC for the last full day
data.current_description: Returns Open/High/Low/Close values with volume and market capitalization for the last full day.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve latest daily OHLCV data for coin
data.description_suggestion: Returns Open/High/Low/Close values with volume and market capitalization for the most recent completed trading day. Data is updated daily and represents the full 24-hour period. This endpoint is available on all API plans and provides a quick way to access the latest daily price action without specifying date ranges.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get OHLC for the last full day' is vague about what 'last full day' means. Description lacks context about data freshness and use case. Enhanced version clarifies that this returns the most recent completed day's data, explains the update frequency, and helps AI agents understand when to use this versus the historical endpoint.

message: Operation 'getCoinOHLCVHistorical' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_input_details. Summary is adequate but description lacks critical context about interval parameter options, plan-based limitations, and default behavior. AI agents need to understand plan restrictions and interval availability to properly construct requests. Enhanced description includes all parameter constraints and plan-specific limitations for better agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns Open/High/Low/Close values with volume and market capitalization for any date range. If the `end` date is the current day, data can change with every request until actual close of the day at 23:59:59"
data.description_suggestion: Returns Open/High/Low/Close values with volume and market capitalization for a specified date range. Supports configurable time intervals (5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 6h, 12h, 24h) depending on API plan. Maximum historical data availability varies by plan: Free (24 hours), Starter (30 days), Pro (90 days), Business (365 days), Enterprise (unlimited). If the end date is the current day, data may change with each request until market close at 23:59:59 UTC. Default interval is 24 hours.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks critical context about interval parameter options, plan-based limitations, and default behavior. AI agents need to understand plan restrictions and interval availability to properly construct requests. Enhanced description includes all parameter constraints and plan-specific limitations for better agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getCoinOHLCVToday' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Original description has grammatical issues ('every each request') and lacks clarity about timezone and update frequency. Missing context about use case and availability. Enhanced version clarifies UTC timezone, specifies 5-minute update interval, explains the dynamic nature of current-day data, and helps AI agents understand when to use this versus the latest daily endpoint.

data.current_description: Returns Open/High/Low/Close values with volume and market capitalization for the current day. Data can change every each request until actual close of the day at 23:59:59.
data.description_suggestion: Returns Open/High/Low/Close values with volume and market capitalization for the current trading day (UTC). Data is updated every 5 minutes and may change with each request until market close at 23:59:59 UTC. This endpoint provides real-time intraday price action and is useful for monitoring current day trading activity. Available on all API plans.
data.reasoning: Original description has grammatical issues ('every each request') and lacks clarity about timezone and update frequency. Missing context about use case and availability. Enhanced version clarifies UTC timezone, specifies 5-minute update interval, explains the dynamic nature of current-day data, and helps AI agents understand when to use this versus the latest daily endpoint.

data.current_description:
Returns basic information about cryptocurrencies tags (categories):
* name
* description
* type of tag: `technical` or `functional`
* number of coins with the tag
* number of ICOs with the tag
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve cryptocurrency tag categories and metadata
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of cryptocurrency tags (categories) with metadata for each tag. Each tag includes: name, description, type (technical or functional), count of coins associated with the tag, and count of ICOs associated with the tag. Tags are used to categorize and filter cryptocurrencies by their characteristics and use cases. Updated hourly.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'List tags' is too generic and doesn't convey the domain context. Description is structured but lacks context about tag purpose and update frequency. Enhanced summary specifies 'cryptocurrency tag categories' for better domain clarity. Enhanced description explains the purpose of tags (categorization and filtering), maintains the structured list of fields, and adds update frequency information for AI agent planning.

data.current_summary: Get id changelog for all coins
data.current_description:
Returns coin id changes made by coinpaprika.com moderators:
* `currency_id` - current id of a coin
* `old_id` - old coin id that has been replaced with a new one
* `new_id` - new coin id that replaced the old one
* `changed_at` - date of the change
data.description_suggestion: Returns a changelog of all coin identifier changes made by Coinpaprika moderators. Each entry includes the current currency_id, the old_id that was replaced, the new_id that replaced it, and the changed_at timestamp. Useful for tracking coin ID migrations and maintaining data consistency when coin identifiers are updated. Available on Starter plan and above. Updated every 1 minute.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about the purpose - 'Get id changelog' doesn't clearly convey this tracks coin identifier changes. Description explains fields well but lacks context about why this is useful or plan availability. Enhanced version clarifies the operation's purpose (tracking ID changes), adds use case context, specifies plan availability, and includes update frequency for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get tickers for all active coins
data.current_description:
Returns price data of all active cryptocurrencies on coinpaprika.com:
* identity (`id`, `name`, `symbol`)
* ranking (`rank`)
* supplies (`circulating_supply`, `total_supply`, `max_supply`)
* [beta coefficient](https://www.investopedia.com/terms/b/beta.asp) (`beta_value`)
* price data in a given currency (price, volumes, market cap, price changes, ath)

**Available on the following API plans:**
- Free - there is no `circulating supply` field in the Free plan. If you need this field, use another API plan.
- Starter
- Pro
- Business
- Enterprise

**Maximum number of assets returned depending on the selected API plan:**

| Plan       | Assets                         |
|------------|-------------------------------------|
| Free       | 2000 |
| Starter    | No limits |
| Pro        | No limits |
| Business   | No limits |
| Enterprise | No limits |

**Update interval:** 
- 60 seconds for Starter, Pro, Business, Enterprise plans
- On average 5 minutes for Free
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve price tickers for all active cryptocurrencies

Returns historical values of `price`, `volume_24h`, `market_cap` for a given cryptocurrency on coinpaprika.com:

**Available history range depending on the selected API plan:**

| Interval | `interval` param values | Free | Starter | Pro | Business | Enterprise |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Daily | `24h`, `1d`, `7d`, `14d`, `30d`, `90d`, `365d` | last 1 year | last 5 years | unlimited | unlimited | unlimited |
| Hourly | `1h`, `2h`, `3h`, `6h`, `12h` | last 1 day | last 30 days | last 90 days | last 365 days | unlimited |
| 5-minute | `5m`, `10m`, `15m`, `30m`, `45m` | none | last 7 days | last 30 days | last 365 days | unlimited |

**Update interval:** Every 5 minutes.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve historical OHLCV data for a specific coin
data.description_suggestion: Returns historical price, volume, and market cap data for a specified cryptocurrency at configurable time intervals. Supports multiple granularities: daily (24h, 1d, 7d, 14d, 30d, 90d, 365d), hourly (1h, 2h, 3h, 6h, 12h), and 5-minute intervals (5m, 10m, 15m, 30m, 45m). Historical data availability varies by plan: Free plan offers up to 1 year daily data and 1 day hourly data; Starter plan up to 5 years daily and 30 days hourly; Pro/Business plans offer extended ranges; Enterprise plan provides unlimited history. Data is updated every 5 minutes.

message: Operation 'getMappings' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Original summary 'API ID mappings' is too vague and not action-oriented. Description, while comprehensive, is verbose and doesn't clearly explain the required input parameter pattern (exactly one provider ID parameter). Enhanced summary uses action verb 'Map' and specifies the domain context. Enhanced description clarifies the single-parameter requirement, lists all supported providers, specifies plan requirements, and explains the response structure for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description:
The API ID Mappings endpoint allows you to map IDs from other cryptocurrency API providers to Coinpaprika API IDs. This is especially useful when you have provider-specific IDs and want to interact with the Coinpaprika API using its own standardized IDs. In addition to Coinpaprika's and other providers internal ID system, this endpoint also supports mapping [ISIN(International Securities Identification Number)](https://www.isin.org/isin-for-cryptocurrency/) and [DTI (Digital Token Identifier)](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/en/#iso:std:iso:24165:-2:ed-1:v1:en) IDs.

**Use Cases:**
  - Map your existing provider IDs (including ISIN and DTI) to Coinpaprika IDs
  - Retrieve other provider IDs (and ISIN, DTI) corresponding to a given Coinpaprika ID
  - Easily integrate and standardize data across different platforms with varying ID systems

This flexibility enables seamless integration across different crypto data sources and allows you to work with a variety of ID formats within the Coinpaprika ecosystem.

**Available mapping providers**
  - Coinpaprika
  - Coinmarketcap
  - Coingecko
  - Cryptocompare
  - [ISIN](https://www.isin.org/isin-for-cryptocurrency/)
  - [DTI](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/en/#iso:std:iso:24165:-2:ed-1:v1:en)

**Available on the following API plans:**
- Business
- Enterprise

**Examples:**

Use a single query parameter to get mappings for a specific Coinpaprika, Coinmarketcap, Coingecko, Cryptocompare, ISIN, or DTI ID. The response will include all available mappings for the specified ID.

```shell
# Get mappings for a specific Coinpaprika ID
curl --request GET \
    --url 'https://api-pro.coinpaprika.com/v1/coins/mappings?coinpaprika=btc-bitcoin' \
    --header 'Authorization: <your-api-key>'
  
# Get mappings for a specific Coinmarketcap ID
curl --request GET \
    --url 'https://api-pro.coinpaprika.com/v1/coins/mappings?coinmarketcap=1' \
    --header 'Authorization: <your-api-key>'\
  
# Get mappings for a specific Coingecko ID
curl --request GET \
    --url 'https://api-pro.coinpaprika.com/v1/coins/mappings?coingecko=bitcoin' \
    --header 'Authorization: <your-api-key>'
  
# Get mappings for a specific Cryptocompare ID
curl --request GET \
    --url 'https://api-pro.coinpaprika.com/v1/coins/mappings?cryptocompare=1' \
    --header 'Authorization: <your-api-key>'
  
# Get mappings for a specific ISIN ID
curl --request GET \
    --url 'https://api-pro.coinpaprika.com/v1/coins/mappings?isin=XTV15WLZJMF0' \
    --header 'Authorization: <your-api-key>'
               
# Get mappings for a specific DTI ID
curl --request GET \
    --url 'https://api-pro.coinpaprika.com/v1/coins/mappings?dti=V15WLZJMF' \
    --header 'Authorization: <your-api-key>'
```

**Update interval:** Every 1 minute.
data.description_suggestion: Maps cryptocurrency identifiers across multiple providers and standards. Accepts a single query parameter specifying an ID from any supported provider (Coinpaprika, Coinmarketcap, Coingecko, Cryptocompare, ISIN, or DTI) and returns all corresponding IDs from other providers. Requires Business or Enterprise plan. Returns a mapping object containing all available ID formats for the queried cryptocurrency. Update interval: 1 minute.

Enhanced description clarifies the single-parameter requirement, lists all supported providers, specifies plan requirements, and explains the response structure for better AI agent interpretability.
